displayNameZh: 用 Claude Code 做了 IdeaCheck 产品
summary: Yt Idea Check component for Remotion.
summaryZh: 适用于 Remotion 的「用 Claude Code 做了 IdeaCheck 产品」组件。

artifact.usageMarkdown: Copy `remotion/yt-idea-check/src/YtIdeaCheck.tsx` into your Remotion project, import `YtIdeaCheck` and `ytIdeaCheckDefaultProps`, then register the composition.
artifact.agentPrompt: Add the Yt Idea Check Remotion asset from remotionhub/remotionhub-assets at remotion/yt-idea-check to my project. Preserve the exported YtIdeaCheckProps API and register the YtIdeaCheck composition with the default props.
